subtasks.description: Query sam_licenses MongoDB collection to retrieve current Adobe contracted state (product line, contract value, term, seat count, renewal date)
Generate SQL query against consumption_facts to aggregate Q4 2024 actual spend and 90-day usage trend by Adobe product line, including monthly spend trajectory

Reconcile current contracted state from sam_licenses with Q4 spend and 90-day usage trend from consumption_facts. Classify each product line by utilization posture (over-contracted, optimal, under-contracted), identify expansion opportunities, hold recommendations, and reduction candidates. Generate renewal trajectory forecast and strategic recommendations.

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks required: (1) mongo_query retrieves contracted state from sam_licenses in a single call—small tier sufficient for straightforward document retrieval. (2) sql_gen produces one multi-table SQL aggregating spend and usage trends with window functions for 90-day trajectory—mid tier handles the join and aggregation complexity. (3) cross_recon performs high-complexity reconciliation: merges licensed state with actual consumption, applies utilization logic to classify posture across product lines, and generates strategic recommendations (expand/hold/reduce)—frontier tier necessary for multi-signal classification, exception handling, and nuanced business logic. The plan minimizes subtasks by consolidating all strategic recommendations into cross_recon rather than splitting into separate policy_action or multitool_plan calls, since the query does not invoke external governance policies or the tool registry."

output.raw_output:
{"sql": "SELECT
    cf.product,
    -- Q4 2024 actual spend
    SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2024_total_spend,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN cf.event_id END) AS q4_2024_event_count,
    AVG(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN cf.daily_active_seats END) AS q4_2024_avg_daily_active_seats,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN cf.user_id END) AS q4_2024_unique_users,
    -- Monthly spend trajectory within Q4 2024
    SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date < '2024-11-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS oct_2024_spend,
    SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-11-01' AND cf.event_date < '2024-12-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS nov_2024_spend,
    SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-12-01' AND cf.event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS dec_2024_spend,
    -- Monthly active seats trajectory
    AVG(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date < '2024-11-01' THEN cf.daily_active_seats END) AS oct_2024_avg_seats,
    AVG(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-11-01' AND cf.event_date < '2024-12-01' THEN cf.daily_active_seats END) AS nov_2024_avg_seats,
    AVG(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-12-01' AND cf.event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN cf.daily_active_seats END) AS dec_2024_avg_seats,
    -- 90-day usage trend (Oct 1 - Dec 31 2024)
    SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN cf.daily_active_seats ELSE 0 END) AS trailing_90d_seat_days,
    SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE
